---
title: "Reston Mark-Recapture Methods"
bibliography: sections/references.bib 
format: 
    docx:
        reference-doc: template.docx
---

```{r}
library(reticulate)
library(fs)
global_paths = import("config.paths", convert = TRUE) 
config_file = as.character(global_paths$CONFIG / 'config.R')
source(config_file)
config = load_config()
# Prepare report variables
load_report_results_file = path(global_paths$SRC, 'load_report_results.r')
source(load_report_results_file)
#source(source_path)
```


{{< include sections/methods.qmd >}}


\newpage
# References

::: {refs}
:::
